title: NoreTeams
description: Interface for Open Parties and Claims, with API support for teammate and ally integrations.
body:
NoreTeams adds a visual team interface for [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims), making it easier to view players, manage parties, handle invites, and work with allies without relying on commands.

It also exposes simple team, teammate, ally, and related-player APIs for Mod developers to utilize.

Default Keybind to open menu is ]
